headline: CEO en iCo Medios
summary:
Ricardo is a bilingual business builder and media innovator with over 15 years of executive experience across the Out-of-Home (OOH), consulting, and advertising industries. He specializes in designing and scaling future-ready media ecosystems — combining strategic vision, operational discipline, and a strong entrepreneurial mindset.

With a deep understanding of how audiences, brands, and physical spaces connect, Ricardo has been a driving force in the evolution of Retail Media, Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH), and Programmatic advertising in Latin America. His work bridges creativity and technology, transforming static inventory into dynamic, data-enabled platforms that deliver measurable impact.

He has launched and led multiple business units from the ground up, pioneered the integration of programmatic DOOH across national networks, and developed hybrid monetization models that fuse media, shopper marketing, and digital performance. Whether negotiating strategic partnerships or building high-performing commercial teams, Ricardo consistently operates with a long-term vision and a relentless focus on scalable value.

He doesn’t just adapt to the future of media — he helps shape it.

Strategic Expertise:

* Retail Media Network Design & Monetization

* Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH) & Smart Inventory Strategy

* Programmatic DOOH (pDOOH) Platform Enablement

* Business Model Innovation & Corporate Entrepreneurship

* Media-Tech Integration & Commercial Strategy

* Financial Structuring & Investment Readiness

* Regional Expansion & LATAM Market Development

* Leadership of High-Impact Commercial & Ops Teams

experiences.title: CEO
experiences.description: 🌟 Co-Founder & Growth Leader at iCo Medios | Transforming Outdoor Media in Colombia As Co-Founder of iCo Medios, I’ve had the privilege of leading our growth and positioning in Colombia’s outdoor advertising industry — turning vision into execution, and execution into results. Together with a team of 70 exceptional professionals, we’ve built a company that stands at the forefront of innovation in Out-of-Home media, with projected annual revenues of USD 11.5 million in 2025. Today, iCo is recognized as one of the most dynamic and digitally driven OOH companies in the region. 🚀 Key Achievements: Structured and launched 7 specialized business units: Billboards, Toll Roads, Buses, Mass Transit Systems, Airports, Urban Furniture, and Shopping Centers. Built a national operation with deep market knowledge and execution capability. Designed and activated a hybrid growth model that fuses OOH with BTL, DOOH and Digital — creating immersive, high-impact advertising experiences. Entered the fascinating world of programmatic DOOH (pDOOH) — with 100% of our digital screens already enabled to be traded programmatically, opening a new frontier of data-driven efficiency and flexibility for brands and agencies. I believe the future of OOH lies in convergence, creativity, and data. That’s the journey we’re building — and I couldn’t be more excited about what’s ahead. Let’s connect and explore ideas, partnerships, and what’s next for media in Colombia and Latin America.

experiences.title: Sales and Marketing Manager
experiences.description: Led the strategic sales and marketing planning for the development and positioning of premium brands across domestic and international high-end channels. Oversaw global expansion, commercial strategy, and sales team leadership. * Managed distribution in 12 countries, including the US, Canada, Europe, and Australia, achieving international sales of USD 2.4M. * Launched and positioned De La TERRA® as a luxury brand, generating USD 610K in first-market sales with 26% net margins. * Opened and managed national distribution in Colombia, securing retail, boutique, and corporate clients for USD 1.25M in annual revenue. * Led global licensing negotiations for brand commercialization in the U.S., with 2012 international sales projected to reach USD 635K.

experiences.title: Sales and Marketing Manager
experiences.description: Led sales and marketing strategy execution for both premium and traditional brands across manufacturing and industrial units. Oversaw forecasting, inventory, portfolio, and communication strategies for national and international markets. * Increased international sales by 23%, reaching USD 1.11M, and national sales by 7%, billing USD 575K. * Expanded local market share from 12% to 21%, developing distribution through retail, corporate, and on-premise channels. * Coordinated global trade fair participation (New York, Frankfurt), enabling entry into USA, France, Italy, and Germany. * Led initiative to bring 21 international buyers to Colombia, fostering direct and sustainable commercial relationships.

experiences.title: Sales and Marketing Assistant
experiences.description: Supported national and international sales and marketing strategies, managing key accounts across multiple distribution channels and ensuring budget execution and sales targets. * Co-developed and launched the company’s national and international sales catalogues (2004–2005) in coordination with the advertising agency. * Created a promotional sales catalogue with Sapia®, generating USD 415K in the first year and benefiting 20 local factories. * Led product presentation and coordination for national trade fairs across 5 manufacturing plants. * Contributed to a 19% increase in national sales and achieved a 15% improvement in portfolio recovery.

education.degree_name: Bachelor of Industrial Engineering with emphasis in Business Administration

accomplishment_courses.name: NYIGF, Sales and Marketing Seminars – Retail Channel, NY-USA

accomplishment_projects.title: Chairman of the Board – EyeCatch Media LLC
accomplishment_projects.description: Chairman of the Board – EyeCatch Media www.eyecatch-media.com As Chairman of the Board at EyeCatch Media, I provide strategic oversight and leadership to a company that is redefining the in-store media experience through high-impact Retail Media Networks. My role focuses on guiding the company’s growth strategy, strengthening governance, and enabling scalable innovation at the intersection of technology, shopper marketing, and digital content. I work closely with the executive team to support decision-making across business development, financial planning, and commercial partnerships — ensuring alignment with our long-term vision of transforming physical retail spaces into dynamic, monetizable media platforms. With a presence in over 50 stores across Florida USA, EyeCatch Media is pioneering a new retail communication model that merges data, technology, and creative storytelling to deliver value for both brands and consumers.

accomplishment_projects.title: International House Ware Trade Fairs
accomplishment_projects.description: Participation and Sales/Marketing experience in the following International House Ware Trade Fairs: *Frankfurt (Ambiente and Tendence) *Madrid (Intergift) *Paris (Maison et Objet) *Hong Kong (Sources) *Guangzhou (Canton) *New York (NYIGF & ICFF) *Milan (Macef) *Lima (LIGF) *Chicago (Chicago Housewares) *Brussels (Trademart) *Los Angeles (LAIGF).

recommendations:
Arturo Echeverri

Ricardo is an out-of-the-box thinker, making always appropiate decisions for the good of the business. He stays close to customers  not only in Colombia but worldwide, frequently bringing new ideas to the company. Ricardo is an excellent seller who I can recomend highly, with no reservations.
